Intro_Start.text: {setState:scenePrefix,Intro}{playVideo:intro}
{bg:JoyPolis}{showTextbox}{center}{color:lime}{blip:3}October 11, 8:41 PM{nl}Joypolis

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {startBGM:investigation,false}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(My name is Phoenix Wright.)

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {color:lightblue}(I'm a lawyer at Wright & Co. Law Offices.)

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {color:lightblue}(I took on a request from a murder suspect, Mr. Will Powers...)

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {color:lightblue}(And came here, to Joypolis.)

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {color:lightblue}(To clear Mr. Powers's name,{nl}I can't afford to overlook a single detail.)

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {color:lightblue}(I should jot down any interesting [Information]{nl}in the [Court Record].)

Intro_Start.name: Edgeworth
Intro_Start.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutCharacter:300}{sprite:Edgeworth["Normal"]}{hideCharacter}{fadeInCharacter:300}{showTextbox}Detective Gumshoe.{nl}Please give us a summary of the case.

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: {blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}{fadeOutBg}(This is Miles Edgeworth.{nl}He's a prosecutor for the district prosecutor's office.)

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeInBg}{fadeOutCharacter:300}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}{hideCharacter}{fadeInCharacter:300}{p:200}{showTextbox}{blip:1,true}Yes, sir.

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: (This is Detective Dick Gumshoe.{nl}He's a homicide detective at the local precinct.)

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: The victim is Mr. Rando Daiba, pal.{nl}He's the manager of Joypolis.

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: The scene of the crime is the manager's office.

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: The victim was put to sleep with sleeping pills,{nl}and stabbed in the back of the neck with a knife, pal.

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: The cause of death is blood loss, and the estimated time of death is between 7:00 PM and 8:00 PM.

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: The body was discovered at 8:00 PM, pal.

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: The first discoverer is the suspect, Will Powers.{nl}He's a member of the Joypolis theater troupe.

Intro_Start.name: Edgeworth
Intro_Start.text: It seems the suspect and the victim often argued over his salary.

Intro_Start.name: Edgeworth
Intro_Start.text: They got into a fight over the same issue this time...{nl}And after murdering him, he reported it himself.

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: H-Hold on a second.{nl}He's denying the crime.

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: Detective Gumshoe.{nl}What exactly led to his arrest?

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: When the suspect visited the manager's office,{nl}he says the door was locked, pal.

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: When he went in with the spare key,{nl}he found the victim dead inside.

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: But, there was a witness who turned that testimony completely upside down.

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: A witness?

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: The victim's manager,{nl}Ms. Ini Miney.

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: According to her testimony, before the incident,{nl}the suspect went into the manager's office with the victim...

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: And later on, he came out of the manager's office.{nl}All by himself.

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: Based on her testimony,{nl}we brought Mr. Powers in for questioning.

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: And then we found a small soy sauce packet in his locker in the dressing room.

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: Don't tell me... Inside that soy sauce packet...?

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: We detected the exact same sleeping pills that were used to put the victim to sleep.

Intro_Start.name: Gumshoe
Intro_Start.text: And that's what led to his arrest.

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: Hmm...

Intro_Start.name: Edgeworth
Intro_Start.text: When the body was discovered, the window to the manager's office was locked from the inside.

Intro_Start.name: Edgeworth
Intro_Start.text: If the suspect's testimony is to be believed,{nl}the scene was a locked room.

Intro_Start.name: Edgeworth
Intro_Start.text: However, suicide is impossible.{nl}The cause of death is a stab wound to the back of the neck.

Intro_Start.name: Edgeworth
Intro_Start.text: If there were a culprit other than the suspect...{nl}They would have had to commit a locked-room murder.

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: A locked-room murder...

Intro_Start.name: Edgeworth
Intro_Start.text: Given this situation...{nl}What do you plan to do, Wright?

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: I won't know what to do until I give it a try.

Intro_Start.name: Phoenix
Intro_Start.text: But I will absolutely prove Mr. Powers's innocence!
{setState:intro_done,true}{hideTextbox}{stopBGM:true}{p:500}{hideCharacter}{fadeOutFg}{fadeBg:mayaMove}{playSound:jingle}{sectionEnd}{skip:0}
